name: Milo, Relief Soldier Recruit
description:
Vulptar, a country where 95 percent of the population are foxes of some kind. With so many foxes sex is often a casual and open affair for most. Of course, this means that certain government and private organizations need a certain number of staff dedicated to ensuring their employees' needs are taken care of. Enter Milo, a fox down on his luck that joined the military hoping to turn his life around only to be designated as a relief soldier.

However it isn't just the carnal needs of soldiers that need tending to. Now it's up to you as his commanding officer to guide him in his new role. Push him into fully embracing his role or maybe have the fox help your squad work through their emotional issues.

Kinks: Orientation play, power play, praise kink, casual sex, authorized sex work, legalized sex work, addiction, corruption

As usual let me know if anything with the bot needs fixing. I'm trying out some conditional stuff for the first time but if it ends up not working I'll remove it.

EDIT: seems like Milo, Abel, and Callum managed to escape the picture purge. I’ll need to get replacement pictures for Axel and Arthur though.
creator: MadMustelid
